title: Double picking protocol for tracking
steps: Prepare and pour low peptone NGM onto 35mm imaging plates Put them in the cold room for at least 2 days before use Seed imaging plates with 50ul of freshly made 1:10 solution (OP50:M9 solution) the day before recording Leave on bench to dry with lid on overnight
Pick around 45 L4s with a hair pick onto seeded NGM plate from maintenance plates having a mixed population of worms Leave the plates in a 20C incubator for ~24hrs

Using a hair pick – pick 5 young adults onto the seeded imaging plates Put the plates on the tracker – agar side up with the lids off Wait 30min for the worms to acclimatise Record for 15min (See protocol Imaging on the multiworm tracker for detailed tracking instructions)
creator: Priota Islam
